integration_validation_v2.gap: Acceptance demands an end-to-end smoke path run (session->lease->state->command->receipt->visual->bundle->release); only a static ModelManual feature-group DESCRIBING the path exists, never executed, and its terminal step diagnostics_debug_bundle_export is status Planned (deferred).
integration_validation_v2.evidence: src/backend/handshake_core/src/model_manual/content.rs:288-299 (feature group is data only); content.rs:2615-2634 (diagnostics_debug_bundle_export status Planned, ipc_channel None); tests/model_manual_tests.rs:763-801 (proof only asserts group/command/workflow membership in the in-memory struct, no PG/EventLedger touch, no smoke-path run)

integration_validation_v3.evidence: tests/atelier_kernel_smoke_tests.rs:114 mt181_diagnostics_integration_smoke_path_runs_end_to_end_on_pg EXECUTES all 8 stages at runtime: session heartbeat, lease claim, work-state projection, command vs real KERNEL-002 catalog (unregistered action_ids rejected), receipt-bound command log, stealth window + capture + screenshot artifact storage, kernel diagnostic bundle manifest (real INSERT + ledger via src/diagnostics/bundle_manifest.rs:301-358), lease release. Every stage re-reads from PostgreSQL and asserts its canonical EventLedger family. Terminal step no longer Planned: content.rs:2616-2634 diagnostics_debug_bundle_export now CommandStatus::Wired; regression guard test :481-518 runs MT-183 drift guard over it. MANUAL_VERSION bumped to 1.5.0.
integration_validation_v3.basis: v3 adversarial per-MT review of remediated deliverable + runtime proof via full-crate managed-PG sweep and kernel-builder fresh-DB proof logs

minimum_controls: Use contract-first identity and preserve projection hash.
risks: Imported MT contract may under-capture prose-only review or proof instructions.
